component.name: NetworkTask
component.script:
sub init() m.top.functionName = "doRequest" end sub
sub doRequest() url = "" if m.top.requestType = "playlists" url = m.top.apiBaseUrl + "/playlists" else if m.top.requestType = "songs" url = m.top.apiBaseUrl + "/playlists/" + m.top.playlistId.tostr() + "/songs" end if
if url = "" then return
request = CreateObject("roUrlTransfer") request.SetUrl(url) request.AddHeader("Authorization", "Bearer " + m.top.authToken) request.AddHeader("Content-Type", "application/json") request.SetCertificatesFile("common:/certs/ca-bundle.crt") request.InitClientCertificates()
responseStr = request.GetToString()
result = {success: false, data: invalid, error: ""}
if responseStr <> "" and responseStr <> invalid json = ParseJson(responseStr) if json <> invalid result.success = true result.data = json else result.error = "Invalid JSON" end if else result.error = "Network error" end if
m.top.response = result end sub
